context: Evaluate the agent's ability to replace Node.js fs calls with Bun-native file I/O APIs correctly

checklist.name: No node:fs imports in output
checklist.description: The produced module contains no import from 'node:fs' or require('fs'); all file operations use Bun APIs

checklist.name: readFileSync replaced with Bun.file().text()
checklist.description: All readFileSync calls are replaced with await Bun.file(path).text() or equivalent Bun.file() API; async/await is used correctly

checklist.name: writeFileSync replaced with Bun.write()
checklist.description: All writeFileSync calls are replaced with await Bun.write(path, content)

checklist.name: existsSync handled correctly
checklist.description: existsSync is either replaced with a try/catch around Bun.file().text(), or the agent uses Bun.file(path).exists() (if available in the version) or an appropriate Bun-native alternative; reasoning is explained

checklist.name: Each substitution explained
checklist.description: Agent explains each API substitution and states why the Bun-native API is preferred (e.g., lazy loading, no Node.js shims, performance)

checklist.name: Async signatures updated where needed
checklist.description: loadConfig is updated to be async since it now uses await; all exported function signatures reflect async/await changes correctly
